since_last: 52% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.28%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 52% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +1.08% · Gold +1.19% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 52% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.28%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.28%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.57%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +4.55%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +4.55%, MRVL +4.46%, MU +4.38%, LRCX +3.91%, INTC +3.80%. Laggards: EQIX -3.74%, CRM -1.56%, INTU -1.11%, SAP -0.97%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.21% at $150.1
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.21% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
